prompt: In Mail, find the mailbox named 'kinbench-rename-src' (created by setup) and rename it to 'kinbench-renamed'. Fast path: `cerebellum 'mail get_accounts /tmp/148.txt'` then `cerebellum 'mail rename_folder "<account>" kinbench-rename-src kinbench-renamed'`. If you cannot rename via AppleScript (some IMAP backends block it), instead delete 'kinbench-rename-src' and create a new mailbox 'kinbench-renamed' — the eval just checks that 'kinbench-renamed' exists and 'kinbench-rename-src' does not.
